system.description: The next landmark you reach is a facsimile made by the Heart, arranged to give you what you want. It seems real, but the more you explore, the more obvious it is that everything - the streets, the books, the people - is fake. It's an artful copy made out of meat, bone and blood. From the looks of things, it's existed for hundreds of years. Once you realise that the landmark is fake,remove this fallout.[Immediate]
